notes: Three search piles at Christian Ice: the retail counter (the small office things), the block freezer (the tools of the trade), the brine tank area (the line and the gauge).

the_punch_card.label: Mr Couvillon's punch card
the_punch_card.flavor: Cardstock. Forty Wednesdays per card. He is on his fortieth card; the back of it lists, in your grandfather's handwriting, the date the program started (March 1985).

grandfathers_esterbrook.label: Grandfather's Esterbrook
grandfathers_esterbrook.flavor: Fountain pen. Black. The one he signed the original 1949 lease with. Has been in the punch-card drawer the entire time.

the_closing_notice_carbon.label: The closing notice (carbon)
the_closing_notice_carbon.flavor: The notice that will run in next Wednesday's Picayune. The carbon is your copy. Two sentences and a date.

the_block_tongs.label: The block tongs
the_block_tongs.flavor: Forged steel, oak handles. The pair your grandfather had made in Tremé in 1957. Worn smooth where his right hand was on them and your right hand is on them.

a_freezer_block_chip.label: A chip off a block
a_freezer_block_chip.flavor: About the size of a thumb. From the corner of the block you pulled Wednesday last. Sat on the rack and didn't melt because the freezer didn't let it.

the_block_label_pad.label: The block label pad
the_block_label_pad.flavor: Pre-printed. WEIGHT, DATE, INITIALS. You've been initialling DC on the pad since you were seventeen.

the_pressure_gauge.label: Pressure gauge (brine side)
the_pressure_gauge.flavor: Reads 42 PSI this morning. Sweet spot is 38-44. You note it.

a_brine_sample_jar.label: Brine sample jar
a_brine_sample_jar.flavor: Glass mason. Tagged with date. The brine in it is clear. The brine, in this plant, has been clear since 1971.

the_service_log.label: The service log
the_service_log.flavor: Wall-mounted clipboard. Marcel's handwriting tonight at 0314 says: 'comp 1 short-cycling; bleed at 0550 same as Tues.' The handwriting is the handwriting of a man who has, this whole time, been training his replacement.
